name: aios
description: AIOS Protocol - 跨平台 AI 系统控制协议

scripts.dev: pnpm run build:daemon:quick && pnpm run dev:client
scripts.dev:separate: concurrently -n daemon,client -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:daemon" "pnpm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:web: pnpm run build:daemon:quick && concurrently -n daemon,web -c blue,magenta "pnpm run dev:daemon:ws" "pnpm run dev:web:only"
scripts.dev:web:only: VITE_AIOS_WEBSOCKET_TOKEN=dev-token pnpm --filter @aios/client exec vite --config electron.vite.config.ts src/renderer
scripts.build:daemon:quick: cd packages/daemon && npx tsup src/index.ts --format esm
